request: Create a 40 second vertical short from the talking-head clip. Use b-roll to cover cuts and show the product moments. Add readable captions with keyword highlights.

assets.description: Creator speaking directly to camera about the app workflow.
assets.transcript: The fastest way to make better short videos is to stop guessing. Start with the hook, cut every dead pause, show the result first, then use b-roll whenever the viewer needs proof.

assets.description: Screen recording of the dashboard with a visible finished video result.

metadata.description: Screen recording of the dashboard with a visible finished video result.

assets.description: Close-up screen recording of trimming pauses on a video timeline.

metadata.description: Close-up screen recording of trimming pauses on a video timeline.

recipe.broll: 3 cutaways · avg 1.5s · interspersed · kinds: startup activities, personal branding visuals, entrepreneurship scenarios
recipe.audio: inspiring background music · throughout · start 0s to end
recipe.summary: Create a 40-second reel featuring Vahan introducing himself and his passion for startups and personal branding. Use a pacing of about 2.1 cuts per 10 seconds with moderate b-roll interspersed throughout, focusing on startup activities and branding visuals. Present word-by-word captions in the center with white text on a black background, and maintain inspiring music throughout the video.
